settings.heading: Request a wholesale quote.
settings.intro: Send a structured procurement brief so GlobiSun can review product fit, quantity, delivery feasibility, timeline, sourcing options, and the $500 wholesale minimum.
settings.body:
For the fastest review, include the product category, expected quantity, budget range, delivery ZIP code, deadline, and whether similar alternatives are acceptable.

GlobiSun supports B2B inquiries for schools, art studios, workshops, small retailers, creative programs, and sourcing partners. Standard wholesale orders start at $500 USD before shipping and taxes; smaller sample requests may be reviewed case by case.

settings.title: Wholesale supply
settings.text: Bulk art materials for schools, studios, workshops, creative programs, and small retailers.

settings.title: Custom sourcing
settings.text: Support for product combinations, classroom kits, color sets, and supplier availability review.

settings.title: Professional response
settings.text: Send clear order details so we can review pricing, lead time, and next steps.

settings.heading: Submit your procurement brief.
settings.intro: Clear details help us review the $500 minimum, pricing, case packs, lead time, substitutions, and fulfillment options more efficiently.

settings.heading: Send a clear purchasing brief.
settings.intro: Quantity, destination ZIP code, timeline, buyer type, and product scope make it easier to respond with a practical next step.

settings.heading: From inquiry to quote review.
settings.intro: A structured inquiry helps GlobiSun review the product category, quantity, delivery ZIP code, timing, and possible sourcing path.

settings.heading: What to include in your request
settings.intro: A complete procurement brief helps us review product fit, substitutes, delivery timing, quote feasibility, and whether the request meets the $500 wholesale minimum.

settings.heading: A complete inquiry helps separate real purchasing requests from general messages.
settings.intro: The best requests include category, quantity, budget, delivery ZIP code, timeline, buyer type, and acceptable alternatives.
